artifact: SRE-Degrees / REx benchmark + pass@k evaluation harness

badges.claim: The benchmark scenarios, simulator, and evaluation harness are publicly and persistently archived under an open license.
badges.expected: A tagged GitHub release (DOI-minted via Zenodo) containing scenarios/, sim/, rex/, experiments/, requirements-rex.txt, and LICENSE.

badges.claim: The harness installs, the benchmark loads, the deterministic judge is correct, and the reward floor does not leak (empty plan and trap both score below the 0.8 pass threshold).
badges.expected: Script exits 0: family counts > 0; floor_ok == true over the full registry; pytest test_rex_deterministic_judge.py all green. No credentials required.

badges.claim: REx attains higher pass@1 than zero-shot/best-of-N on the novel-incident family, with the gap exceeding sampling noise (non-overlapping or improved Wilson 95% CI).
badges.expected: experiments/results/frontier_pass_at_k.json written; by_condition.rex.by_family.novel['pass@1'] >= by_condition.zero_shot.by_family.novel['pass@1'], with the reproduced per-condition pass@1 landing inside the camera-ready Wilson 95% CI (or CIs overlapping).
